data.title: audit: normalize skogai-caveman `create-new-skill` skill
data.description:
Repo: `/home/skogix/.local/src/marketplace/plugins/skogai-caveman`

Audit `skills/create-new-skill/` against current SkogAI skill-authoring conventions.

Scope:

* review whether this skill overlaps with newer router-based skill-authoring patterns
* identify stale structure, wording, or path assumptions
* capture whether it should stay as-is, be modernized, or be retired in favor of newer routing

Done when the repo-local backlog for this skill is explicit.
